Aggregates_rewrite_rules.description: More general form of AGGREGATE_PROJECT_PULL_UP_CONSTANTS that matches any relational expression
Aggregates_rewrite_rules.summary: Rewrite: SELECT SUM(x) + 10 FROM table -> SELECT SUM(x) + 10 FROM table. Constants are pulled up outside the aggregation to optimize the calculation.

Filters_rewrite_rules.description: Rule that merges a Filter into a MultiJoin, creating a richer MultiJoin
Filters_rewrite_rules.summary: Rewrite: SELECT * FROM table1 JOIN table2 JOIN table3 WHERE condition -> SELECT * FROM table1 JOIN (SELECT * FROM table2 WHERE condition) t2 JOIN table3. The filter is merged into the MultiJoin to improve performance.

Sort_rewrite_rules.description: Rule that pushes a Sort past a Union
Sort_rewrite_rules.summary: Rewrite: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM table1 UNION SELECT * FROM table2 ORDER BY id) -> SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM table1 ORDER BY id UNION SELECT * FROM table2 ORDER BY id). The sort is pushed into the branches of the UNION for optimized sorting.
